name: Delaware Title Loans, Inc.
description_short: Delaware Title Loans, Inc. offers auto title loans and installment loans up to $15,000 in Claymont, DE, with same-day funding and no proof of income required.
description_long:
Delaware Title Loans, Inc. operates a single brick-and-mortar lending store at 115 Naamans Road in Claymont, Delaware, serving northern Delaware communities including Brandywine, Ashbourne Hills, Radnor Green, and Holly Oak. The company positions itself as a local, direct lender focused on fast-turnaround emergency cash solutions for Delaware residents facing unexpected expenses such as rent, medical bills, or car repairs.

The company offers two primary loan products. Auto title loans allow borrowers to use their lien-free vehicle title as collateral to access up to $15,000, with no proof of income required — only a valid ID, the vehicle title, and the vehicle itself for an in-person inspection. Signature installment loans are also available and require a valid ID, a checking account statement, and a recent pay stub. Both products target borrowers who need funds quickly, with the company advertising approval decisions in as little as 30 minutes and same-day or next-business-day cash disbursement.

Delaware Title Loans, Inc. distinguishes itself by operating as a direct lender with no middlemen, accepting all credit types including bad credit, and providing an online application form available 24/7 even though funding requires an in-store visit. The store maintains limited but regular hours — Monday through Friday 10AM–6PM and Saturday 9AM–1PM — and a local staff team that handles phone consultations after online form submission to walk applicants through requirements before their visit.

Consumers should approach title loans with caution regardless of the lender. The website does not disclose APRs, fees, or repayment terms, which are critical for evaluating the true cost of borrowing. Title loans carry the significant risk of vehicle repossession if the borrower cannot repay, and they are widely associated with very high annualized interest rates. The absence of income verification for title loans lowers the barrier to borrowing but does not reduce repayment obligations. This product is best suited as a genuine last resort for vehicle-owning borrowers who have exhausted lower-cost alternatives.
address: 505 N Dupont Hwy, New Castle, DE 19720

company_info.headquarters: 505 N Dupont Hwy, New Castle, DE 19720

pros: Loan amounts up to $15,000 based on vehicle value — higher ceiling than typical payday or small-dollar lenders
No proof of income required to qualify for a title loan
All credit types accepted, including bad credit
Direct lender with no broker or middlemen involved
Approval decision possible in as little as 30 minutes after in-store vehicle inspection
Online application form available 24/7 to start the process before visiting the store
Offers two distinct products — title loans and signature installment loans — giving borrowers some choice
cons: Vehicle is used as collateral for title loans, creating real risk of repossession if unable to repay
APRs, fees, and repayment terms are not disclosed anywhere on the website, making cost comparison impossible without calling
Only one physical location in Claymont, DE — not accessible to borrowers across most of the state
Store is closed Sundays and closes early on Saturdays (9AM–1PM), limiting access for working borrowers
Title loans are short-term, high-cost products frequently associated with debt cycles for borrowers who roll over balances
best_for: Vehicle owners in northern Delaware with a lien-free car title who need emergency cash quickly
Borrowers with poor or no credit history who do not qualify for bank loans or credit union products
Delaware residents who need same-day or next-day funding and cannot wait for traditional loan approval timelines
Car owners without current proof of income (e.g., between jobs) who still need short-term liquidity
diagnosis: Delaware Title Loans, Inc. is best for northern Delaware vehicle owners who have exhausted lower-cost options and need emergency cash same-day against their car title, regardless of credit history. The main caveat is that APRs and fees are not disclosed online, and pledging a vehicle as collateral carries serious financial risk — borrowers should request full cost disclosures before signing.
services: In-store vehicle inspection for loan valuation
Phone consultation with a loan representative after online submission
No proof of income title loan qualification
In-person loan closing at Claymont, DE storefront
